name: Hematology Equipment
description: Advanced automated blood cell counters, reagents, and diagnostic tools for medical clinics and hospitals.

name: Biochemistry Equipment
description: High-precision chemistry analyzers, reagents, and clinical chemistry systems for laboratory diagnostic testing.

name: Imaging & Radiology
description: Portable and stationary X-Ray systems, ultrasound scanners, and dry film printers for modern diagnostic imaging.

name: Hospital Furniture
description: Ergonomic hydraulic delivery beds, electric ward beds, examination couches, and medical cabinets for patient comfort.

name: Dental Equipment
description: Complete dental chairs, units, scalpels, and specialized dental diagnostics and tools for oral healthcare.

name: Laboratory Equipment
description: Clinical microscopes, centrifuges, incubators, autoclaves, and diagnostic refrigeration systems.

name: Surgical Tools
description: Sterile operation theatre equipment, surgical kits, autoclaves, and premium instruments.

name: Emergency Equipment
description: Defibrillators, mobile stretchers, oxygen concentrators, and portable resuscitators for rapid response.

name: ICU Equipment
description: Patient monitors, mechanical ventilators, infusion pumps, and critical care units for intensive support.

name: Lab Consumables
description: Reagents, test kits, blood tubes, pipettes, syringes, and daily disposables for clinical labs.
